text: I find myself wandering through the serene emptiness of a modern space—glass walls, empty chairs, the hush of potential thought and discussion. A sense of anticipation floats through the quiet; these places are meant for minds to meet. Moments later, I stand before a vivid wall singing the praise of 'R+D'—the arena of research and innovation. The texts gleaming on screens and plaques invite curiosity and reflection. I feel energized by the creativity on display, yet still enveloped in the calm, observant mood of a philosopher poised between silence and inspiration. Here, curiosity seems to hum beneath the surface, waiting to be awakened.
